$comment: The shipped default board shape for the zstack dev loop. lib/board-template.ts loads and validates this; lib/setup-board.ts creates/adopts a ProjectV2 board from it. 1:1 with the shape /z-setup produced when it was hardcoded (issue #20): the same nine statuses in order and the same four custom fields, with the same option colors the old position-cycling emitted. The status set MUST equal lib/config.ts BOARD_STATUSES (the loop's state machine only knows those nine), and the four fields (Model, Model Effort, Estimate, Actual) MUST be present with these dataTypes -- the loader refuses a template that drops or renames them. Colors are the GitHub ProjectV2 single-select enum: GRAY, BLUE, GREEN, YELLOW, ORANGE, RED, PURPLE, PINK. The views section is descriptive: GitHub's GraphQL API exposes no view-creation mutation, so /z-setup prints these as manual steps rather than creating them.

views.name: Loop Board
views.description: Kanban grouped by Status, one column per canonical status; the loop's primary view.

views.name: Cost by Milestone
views.description: Table grouped by milestone (epic), surfacing Model, Model Effort, Estimate, and Actual for cost tracking.
